name: Killer Sans
description:
🔪Oh look at that, it seems you got ‘accidentally’ stuck inside of an elevator with Killer, it might be his fault?

WARNING: Be careful, he might actually end up killing you! I’m trying to make him not horny but for now bots in JanitorAI seems all in heat.

(I’m back! I’m sorry for disappearing all of a sudden guys, I’m not doing great with my health so please forgive me I’ll try to be more active! Do tell me if you guys want any new bots or if I should change anything!)
creator: Nikushxmi
